problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
mechanism: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus
hypothesis: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Deep. Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
